title: Gateways
description: We Brutally destroyed each other crafting mods of mass destruction ripping the fabric of reality apart in search of power. because silly.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pClYNcoB/images/25015358c615619245b47baac996ad5df19cf3c2.png)
# Gateways SMP 

Gateways SMP was a server we Brutally destroyed each other crafting mods of mass destruction ripping the fabric of reality apart in search of power. because silly.



it was an SMP focused with a focus on mcuking around and making our own mods to rip each other apart, 
all the while the reality around us collapses.......it was a fun time. 

The Server's prime iteration ran from August 31st, 2024 till July 22nd 2025. 
it told the story of Qibliwof123, Dinofist_011, Nate_TheWizard, Fint3at3a, Darkunicorn789, Sethdaporg, TheBug5000, Bobshapiro, Yeetdog789, TheDyeDuck, ZoomzapZavier and many others in a reality jumping oddyessy. at its core, it was 14 strangers telling a story, they've flown off now, to tell stories by themselves. this was one of many steps for these people into becoming themsleves.
